title: API - Try it yourself window
excerpt: Is the API Try it yourself window being monitored?  Perhaps if I knew what your server was actually seeing it might make it easier for me to fix my posts to the API.

posts.author: enlightened (Bill Cooke)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the API Try it yourself window being monitored? Perhaps if I knew what your server was actually seeing it might make it easier for me to fix my posts to the API.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @enlightened - could you expand a bit on what you mean by ‘monitored’?

Are you having problems with your API calls right now? Could you let us know what error you’re seeing?

Best,
Daniel

posts.author: Yoav_Amir (Yoav Amir)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @enlightened, Can you elaborate a bit more on what is not working?

posts.cookedHtml: You work at (or are employed by) Monday?
